# Glancelytics

 (1) 

## Privacy-first website analytics without cookies.

[Visit website](https://www.glancelytics.com/?ref=uneed.best&ref_type=adv)87 Upvotes

Overview Comments (1)Rewards Deals

![Image 2: Glancelytics image number 01](https://www.uneed.best/_ipx/f_webp&q_70/https://backend.uneed.best/storage/v1/object/public/product_medias/glancelytics/27434/1774378858202-1.webp)

![Image 3: Glancelytics image number 11](https://www.uneed.best/_ipx/f_webp&q_70/https://backend.uneed.best/storage/v1/object/public/product_medias/glancelytics/27434/1774378859361-2.webp)

![Image 4: Glancelytics image number 21](https://www.uneed.best/_ipx/f_webp&q_70/https://backend.uneed.best/storage/v1/object/public/product_medias/glancelytics/27434/1774378860306-3.webp)

**Glancelytics**is a privacy-first website analytics tool built for teams that want clear traffic insights without cookies, invasive profiling, or GA4 complexity.

Track the metrics that matter in a clean dashboard:

*   pageviews

*   unique visitors

*   top pages

*   referrers

*   devices

*   live activity

Glancelytics is designed to stay simple:

*   no cookie consent banner for analytics

*   no personal data collection

*   lightweight script

*   fast setup with one script snippet

*   free plan available for one site

It works well for founders, indie makers, agencies, and product teams that want a calmer way to understand website traffic without the noise of a full marketing stack

Less noise, more clarity.

Curious to see how far you can take this while still giving enough depth for real decision making.

Keep things simple on the surface, but still give enough depth when you need to dig in.
